findings.description: dbt compile --project-dir defaults --profiles-dir to ~/.dbt, not the project directory. Each demo product has a local profiles.yml but dbt ignored it, causing build failure.
findings.proposedRule: When using dbt compile --project-dir, ALWAYS pass --profiles-dir explicitly

findings.description: pip install --no-deps + pip check in Dockerfile failed with 17 missing transitive deps and 3 version conflicts. Base image (dagster-celery-k8s:1.9.6) doesn't contain our packages' transitive dependencies.
findings.proposedRule: Layered Docker builds with --no-deps require an explicit dependency compatibility matrix

findings.description: Base image dagster 1.9.6 conflicts with floe packages requiring >=1.10.0. Also pydantic and kubernetes version conflicts. Discovered at Docker build time, not design time.
findings.proposedRule: Base image version pinning MUST be coordinated with package pyproject.toml constraints

findings.description: 96 structural tests validate Dockerfile, Makefile, Helm values, .dockerignore, and definitions.py by parsing files on disk. Zero Docker builds, zero K8s deployments. Caught real issues at 1% of runtime test cost.
findings.proposedRule: Packaging pipelines MUST have structural parse-and-assert tests as the first tier

findings.description: PR reviewer caught COPY packages/ and COPY plugins/ copying 23+ packages when only 4 installed. Wasted build context, bloated image, leaked source code.
findings.proposedRule: Dockerfile COPY instructions MUST be selective — copy only what's installed or used

findings.description: Makefile demo target had inline floe compile block duplicating work already done by compile-demo prerequisite. Two code paths used different flags and drifted.
findings.proposedRule: Makefile targets MUST rely on prerequisite dependencies. Never duplicate compilation steps inline.
